question: What must happen for a block of code to run when using the 'and' keyword?

options.A: Only the first condition needs to be True
options.B: Only the second condition needs to be True
options.C: Both conditions must be True at the same time

question: What must happen for a block of code to run when using the 'or' keyword?

options.A: Either condition can be True (just one is enough)
